changelog:
ADVANCED MEDIA MATRIX V5.5:
- [UI] Grid Gallery: Support for attaching and seamlessly rendering up to 4 mixed media files (Images, Video, PTT Audio) in a dynamic 2x2 CSS grid.
- [SYSTEM] JSON Payload: Transmitter now automatically handles multiple attachments, packaging them into a lightweight JSON array without requiring any database restructuring.
- [FIX] Ciphertext Integrity: Removed HTML maxlength constraints that previously truncated large E2E encrypted payloads in Direct Messages, shifting validation entirely to the JS engine.
